ABOUT YOUR DRIVER

A Better Ride,
Every Ride.

Hi, I’m Michael — the driver behind Drive Direct.

After 11+ years in rideshare, I created Drive Direct to give riders a safer, more reliable, and more personal transportation experience while also making rides more cost-effective by cutting out the middleman.

Too often, riders end up paying higher prices while a large portion goes directly to app fees instead of the actual driver. Drive Direct was built to create a better balance — helping riders save money while allowing me to earn more fairly for the service I provide.

My goal isn’t just getting people from place to place — it’s building trusted relationships with riders who value consistency, direct communication, comfort, and peace of mind every time they travel.

Whether it’s airport rides, long-distance trips, work commutes, or scheduled pickups, I focus on professionalism, safety, reliability, and making every ride comfortable and stress-free.

No random drivers.
No surge pricing games.
Just dependable service from someone who genuinely cares about the people riding with him.

Learn More About Me
  • 4.97 Rated on Major Rideshare Platform
  • 11+ Years of Rideshare Experience
  • “Same driver every ride. Direct line. No app middleman. Just a better way to get around.”
